cap: Two-part local LLM evaluation harness: a dependency-free script hitting OpenAI-compatible endpoints for raw coding/reasoning/NIAH benchmarks, plus a second harness that drives Claude Code/Codex/Hermes as pluggable agent shells against a bwrap-isolated git sandbox with deterministic pytest/diff-based grading of 14 agentic tasks.

MCP server that lets Claude Code call out to other LLMs (OpenAI, Gemini via reused Gemini-CLI OAuth, Kimi, MiniMax, GLM) for code review or general Q&A, with per-provider API-key config and multi-agent 'review all' aggregation
A link-shortening and attribution platform with click analytics, custom domains, affiliate/partner commission tracking, and an admin console, built as a Next.js/Prisma/Tinybird stack.

A Chromium fork (distributed as source patches) adding tab workspaces, auto-saved sessions, local-only SQLite visit analytics, and a built-in MCP server exposing real OS-level browser control (read/write tools) to Claude/Cursor/Codex with per-client token grants.

runs a Claude Code (or Codex-compatible) coding agent as a persistent bot, driven from Telegram/VK chat, that plans a feature, implements it on a branch in an isolated sandboxed workspace, tests, reviews, and opens a PR
Bash wrapper that launches Codex CLI/Desktop against per-profile CODEX_HOME directories so multiple accounts (work/personal/school) stay isolated without copying auth tokens.
multi-provider terminal coding-agent CLI (Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama) with a workflow/step engine, headless mode with JSON event schema, MCP client, and local knowledge-base memory.
Offline Electron desktop app for cloning a person's face/voice from video and generating talking-avatar videos driven by text/voice, using local docker services for ASR/TTS/face-driving.
small ChatGPT-backed CLI/server that generates LeetCode-style algorithm problem explanations (data structures used, time/space complexity) for practice problems

A CLI that parses a markdown plan (tasks + file ownership + dependencies) into dependency-ordered waves, dispatches each task to an agent CLI (configurable per role) in an isolated git worktree running an implement→test→review→fix loop, and exposes a `wb plan` command that generates the markdown plan itself by having a planner agent explore the codebase.

local-first control plane sitting between AI agents (Claude Code, MCP clients, browser assistants) and the tools/data they touch: tamper-evident hash-chained audit ledger, default-deny policy firewall, human-in-the-loop approval queue, secret/PII redaction, short-lived credential leases, and a Wasm/Landlock sandboxed tool runner, with a Tauri desktop UI and Chrome extension

Real-time monitoring SDK+services that wrap agent runs, run 17 structural failure detectors (tool loops, retry storms, context bloat, goal abandonment, etc.) on every completed run with no LLM, and alert to Slack/webhook within 15s

Terminal coding-agent CLI/library built as a distribution layer over pi-coding-agent, adding multi-model routing by cost/intent, multi-agent task-board teams, context-fork subprocess isolation, workspace rewind (per-turn file snapshots), background tasks, and LSP integration.

A FastAPI service implementing a closed-loop image-generation pipeline: an ExpertAgent (Gemini) reads NumPy image statistics (mean/std/max) and rewrites the SDXL prompt across iterations until a CriticAgent accepts the result.

Self-hosted Jupyter/web coding platform that tests hand-written PyTorch implementations (attention, norm layers, optimizers, etc.) against automated correctness/gradient/timing checks, like LeetCode for ML internals.

Spring Boot e-commerce customer-service backend with a RouterAgent classifying user intent (logistics/guide/chitchat) via DeepSeek function calling, routing to sub-agents that query real order/product tables, with WebSocket human-takeover
a self-hosted Go+Vue file server unifying local dirs, OSS/S3, SFTP, and Git repos behind REST/OpenAPI/MCP endpoints, with a CLI (afile) for starting the service and doing workspace file ops

a Claude Code skill that fans a prompt out in parallel to multiple independent model panelists (Opus re-run, GPT-5.5 via codex CLI, Gemini via agy CLI), then has Opus judge and synthesize a grounded final answer with consensus/contradiction analysis, saving a provenance file per run.

HTTP-based protocol and multi-language client/server libraries for durable, resumable, offset-addressable data streams (catch-up + live tail) used to reliably stream LLM tokens, tool outputs, and app state to clients.

Laravel package providing a durable-execution engine: long-running, retryable, resumable workflows composed of activities, with queueing, child workflows, signals, timers, and persistent state storage.
a local-first static analyzer that scans multi-language codebases for dead code, secrets, security issues, and AI-generated-code mistakes, and gates PRs via a GitHub Action

A personal-finance chat assistant ('BillMind') built as a full-stack learning project: LangChain/LangGraph agent for natural-language expense logging/querying, FastAPI+PostgreSQL backend, React frontend, RAG knowledge base, and an Amap MCP integration.

Full-stack custom AI agent platform: connectors syncing Slack/Notion/GDrive/Salesforce/Zendesk/etc into a retrieval layer, a Rust sandbox CLI for running untrusted agent-generated functions, a TS CLI agent client, and Temporal-based workflow orchestration for data sync.

orchestrates up to hundreds of LLM agents (Claude/GPT/Gemini/etc.) through a publication-and-peer-review MCP system with self-editable system prompts and optional Kubernetes computer-use sandboxes, applied to math/security research problems

Terminal UI chat client for LLMs with pluggable backends (Ollama, OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, LangChain) and editor integrations (Neovim, clipboard), featuring chat bubbles, syntax-highlighted code blocks, and session persistence.
drag-and-drop visual builder that generates native runnable Python AG2 (AutoGen) multi-agent code from a flow diagram

embeddable Rust memory engine giving agents five primitives (ingest/query/consolidate/forget/resolve) over an event-sourced SQLite/Postgres store with hybrid FTS5+vector+graph search and bi-temporal fact resolution.

Native cross-device terminal (Rust/GPUI) that unifies multiple AI coding CLIs (Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode etc.) in one workspace, tracking sessions, worktrees, token usage, and SSH, with P2P desktop/phone/headless-host handoff.
A Go daemon+CLI that wires Cloudflare, Tailscale, Docker, Kamal and GitHub together on one Linux box so `git push` deploys any app in under 5 seconds, no PaaS/YAML.
Claude Code plugin that spawns interactive TUI panels (tmux split panes) for emails, calendars, flight bookings etc., driven by Claude via a skills-based IPC protocol.

a peer-to-peer substrate (MsgPack-over-TCP, mDNS discovery) giving any process a named Node with peers, capabilities, RPC endpoints, shared broadcast conversations, agent cards, heartbeats, and cron/solar-scheduled periodic tasks

MCP server exposing the Bitkub crypto exchange API as tools (wallet, market data, order placement, technical-indicator calculators like RSI/ATR/EMA) plus a bundled 'bitkub-trade' Claude/Codex plugin skill with risk-tiered playbooks.

Zero-dependency Go HTTP framework (radix-tree router, middleware, JSON streaming) plus an adapter that exposes Go functions as Claude/OpenAI-callable tools, bundled with web_search/web_read/web_fetch/datetime/memory tools.

OpenCode plugin implementing a multi-agent workflow router (discuss/plan/execute/review) with persistent .planning/STATE.md, a bundled Rust CLI (fdx) for token-optimized code reading/search/diff, and governance hooks (patch trust scoring, loop detection, tool guards).
CLI that converts an OpenAPI/swagger.json spec into a compilable, launch-ready ASP.NET Core backend project using NSwag plus Roslyn-based post-processing (package resolution, controller/model logic).
a voice assistant that wires LiveKit's VoicePipelineAgent to a local Perplexica search instance via function calling, using Ollama/Whisper/Kokoro for a fully local speech-to-search-to-speech loop

Rust schema + validator + CLI that checks a JSON "cycle receipt" and TOML loop config conform to a 9-stage inspect-act-verify contract (ingest, assess, plan, task, execute, audit, review, replan, confirm), defaulting to a no-mutation policy.
Rust policy engine + CLI that evaluates a tool-invocation's metadata against explicit rules and emits an allow/deny/review_required JSON decision receipt, without executing the tool itself.

A Claude Code plugin implementing a closed think→spec→execute→review→ship→retro loop where a worker agent's output is checked by a separate verifier agent and a bounded (max-2) fix-agent retry, with mechanical bash-hook gates (blocking rm -rf, force-push, secret-file reads) rather than agent self-grading, plus dynamic on-the-fly agent synthesis for uncovered roles.

local gateway that translates OpenAI- and Anthropic-compatible API calls into Windsurf's internal gRPC protocol via its Language Server binary, letting Claude Code/Cline/Cursor/any OpenAI SDK use Windsurf's model access through an account pool with failover
QQ chatbot (NoneBot2/OneBot via NapCat) with a 50+ tool agent loop, music/search/video/image plugins, and a React WebUI admin panel

A bilingual (zh/en) marketing and interactive-demo website for an 'AGI Flow' product, with deterministic canned demos of a knowledge-base, workflow, and agent chat and a login bridge to the real product.
a CLI/library that compiles a logical architecture model into living, interactive HTML diagrams, validating the model against a schema

general-purpose Claude Code plugin toolkit for meta-development of Claude Code itself: skills for building agents/hooks/skills/slash-commands/statuslines, an agent-teams coordination guide, a researcher subagent, GitHub PR helper commands, and evaluation-suite scaffolding for coding/conversational/research/computer-use agents

Multi-agent pipeline (retriever, planner, stylist, visualizer, critic) that generates publication-quality academic diagrams/plots from paper content, using in-context learning from a curated reference set and iterative critic-driven refinement.
FastAPI service running a LangGraph agent for mall customer-service chat, doing hybrid pgvector+Elasticsearch BM25 retrieval with RRF fusion and exposing retrieval via an MCP server module
Android multi-tool utility app (compass, calculator, decibel meter, barcode/ID scanning, encryption tools, etc.) with an optional LLM chat/agent feature via Xunfei Spark model

Full-stack web app where students/teachers submit Python or Markdown files and an LLM-backed grading agent returns structured score/grade/comments via SSE streaming, with follow-up Q&A on the grading result.

Local-first Electron desktop app (Lovable/v0/Bolt alternative) that runs a full coding-agent engine (tool calls, MCP, smart context, sandboxed local agent) to build and preview web apps from chat, with bring-your-own AI keys.

a local Claude Code framework with 86 subagents, a governed /agileteam workflow gated by Product Vision/Canvas artifacts, a 'Runtime Integrity/Reality Layer' that checks evidence-class claims (fake/mock vs real-boundary) before work counts as done, and a multi-model /concilium council path with an internal benchmark corpus

an MCP server plus CLI that stores durable per-project engineering memory (architectural decisions, conventions, bug history, session notes) in SQLite, exposes it as MCP tools an agent queries before editing, and can export/restore it as markdown for git-tracked persistence
A Python runtime prototype that maps the code-agent observe-plan-act-verify loop onto smart-home control, with a policy/permission layer, planner, and state verifier gating device actions.

Automated code-review tool that indexes ~116K past code-review examples with hybrid dense (FAISS)/sparse (BM25s) retrieval fused via Reciprocal Rank Fusion, feeds the top-K similar examples as few-shot context to a local LLM (Qwen/DeepSeek) to generate review comments and fixes, shown via a Streamlit diff viewer.
a CLI that generates long-form multi-chapter fiction from a YAML story-prompt spec (outline, style, characters), chapter by chapter, via an LLM

a personal long-running project scaffolding a Debian-based 'HueyOS' with kernel-config assembly scripts, a PyGPT-derived local-LLM agent runtime, media transcription pipeline, and elaborate governance/constitution documentation, with V1 scope narrowed to one MP3-fixture transcription loop on a handheld PC

Desktop Electron cockpit that spawns and drives the 'omp' coding-agent CLI over its --mode rpc protocol, rendering live agent chat, tool calls, sessions, MCP servers, skills, and GitHub context per project.

a chat-driven agent harness that runs a pluggable backend coding/action agent (Claude Agent SDK, Kilo, OpenCode, Codex, or OpenAI Agents) over MCP tools, reachable from Telegram, Discord, Teams, terminal, or a Flutter companion app, with persistent background behaviors

A Go reverse-proxy sidecar in front of an AI agent that enforces auth, command-approval workflows, egress domain whitelisting, PII/secret-leak blocking, and a credentialless API broker with audit logging.

ChatBI agent that answers natural-language data-analysis questions by having an LLM (Qwen) plan and call MCP tools/Headless-BI APIs instead of generating SQL directly, exposed via a FastAPI backend and Gradio web UI
Python framework for building and running agentic/RAG workflows as composable node graphs, with a CLI, checkpointing backends (filesystem/postgres/memory), caching, and tracing callbacks.
kubectl-style CLI for the Dynatrace observability platform (workflows, dashboards, DQL queries, SLOs, extensions, etc.) with structured/agent-mode output and a bundled AI agent skill

collection of runnable demo apps + OTel/OneAgent instrumentation recipes that trace, cost-meter, and evaluate LLM/agent-framework calls (Bedrock, CrewAI, ADK, MCP, coding agents like Claude Code/Codex/OpenCode) for Dynatrace observability

a Rust stdio proxy that wraps an MCP server subprocess, parses streamed JSON-RPC requests, and blocks/prompts on regex-matched destructive commands, obfuscated payloads, and sensitive path access before forwarding to the wrapped server

CLI that generates/converts/imports rules, MCP config, commands, subagents, skills, hooks, and permissions across ~30 AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, OpenCode, Copilot, etc.) from one unified .rulesync/ source.

Tauri desktop app that hosts Claude Code and OpenCode in native fullscreen TUI tabs per-tab, reads their structured transcript/event output aloud via local TTS, and drives an animated avatar plus an offload-server dashboard for local/remote LLM backends
an npm CLI that installs two bridge skills connecting OpenSpec's propose/archive spec workflow to Superpowers' plan/execute skills, annotating tasks with mapping comments and verifying coverage

self-hosted Go server that ingests Apple HealthKit data, computes derived readiness/energy/sleep/stress scores in Postgres with documented, versioned formulas, and exposes both a web dashboard and an MCP server for AI agents to query the health database

A categorized collection of 269 ready-to-import Dify workflow templates (translation, image/video gen, RAG, code-gen, TTS/podcast, agents) plus a handful of supporting FastAPI/Flask microservices (AKShare stock data, EdgeTTS, video generation) that some workflows call out to.

a WebSocket server that wraps the Claude Agent SDK for remote bidirectional use, deployable as an E2B sandbox template, with a TypeScript client library to connect, send messages, and manage sandbox files

a headless SQLite-backed CRM (contacts/deals/pipeline) exposed both as a scriptable CLI with JSON output and as a mounted FUSE/NFS virtual filesystem so any file-reading tool or agent gets full read/write CRM access with no integration code
Node CLI that recursively generates SERP queries, scrapes with Firecrawl, extracts learnings via LLM, and recurses on new directions to depth/breadth limits, producing a markdown research report.

LLM-powered retrieval pipeline that plans an entity schema from a query, searches the web (Exa keyword+neural), extracts entities via token-marker LLM extraction, and enriches each entity's columns into a confidence-scored table

a Bun-native agent harness with a durable TurnState that snapshots to disk so an agent session can pause (poll/wait/timer) and resume in a fresh process/sandbox, backed by PGlite-based observational memory (hybrid pgvector+tsvector retrieval) including memory of screenshots
Android (React Native/Expo) client that connects over HTTP+SSE to a self-hosted opencode coding-agent server, streaming chat, tool-call approval, and inline diff review from a phone.

Stop-hook judge layer (Reflexion pattern) that classifies each agent turn as complete or premature (permission-seeking, stopped-with-todos, false-complete) and re-prompts with targeted feedback, enforcing tests/PR/CI gates before letting the agent stop.

MCP server + CLI providing Qdrant-backed hybrid (sparse+dense) semantic retrieval plus structural memory hooks that auto-inject relevant project context (ADRs, decisions, past sessions) into Claude Code/Cursor/OpenCode sessions.
Tiled/Phaser-rendered 2D RPG environment where a websocket-connected GPT-3.5 agent chooses actions (move, plant, harvest) based on its surroundings and internal sleepiness state.
CLI/webui tool that downloads YouTube videos, translates subtitles via Kimi/DeepSeek LLM APIs, and re-muxes a subtitled video with ffmpeg, with scheduled channel monitoring.

Turns free-form coding requests into staged, spec-driven task plans (spec -> tasks -> validation) with a web gallery UI, designed to be driven by Claude Code/Codex/Gemini-CLI/opencode via plain-markdown hooks.
A Next.js web app that lets users upload CSV files and chat with an LLM (via E2B sandboxed code execution) to generate interactive charts from the data.
CLI agent that uses OpenAI's Assistants API inside an E2B sandbox to read/write files in a cloned GitHub repo, run commands, and open a pull request
Curated, categorized list of open-source and closed-source AI agent products/frameworks with descriptions and links, plus a web UI at e2b.dev/ai-agents.

A FastAPI service exposing Claude Code (running inside an E2B sandbox) over HTTP: POST /chat creates a sandbox, optionally clones a GitHub repo, and runs `claude -p` with MCP config; POST /chat/{session} resumes the same sandbox via a session-id-to-sandbox-id map.
SDK (JS/Python) that spins up an E2B sandbox running a Jupyter kernel so AI-generated code can be executed and its outputs (incl. charts) captured back into an agent app.
SDK providing a full virtual desktop (VM) sandbox with app launch, window streaming, and control primitives for computer-use agents.

SDKs (Python/JS) and CLI for creating and controlling secure, isolated cloud sandboxes (VMs) that AI agents can run code and commands in, with filesystem, PTY, git, snapshot, and network-rule APIs plus a template-build system for custom sandbox images.

Collection of runnable example projects (Python/TypeScript) showing how to use the E2B sandbox SDK with various LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Together, WatsonX) and agent frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, Autogen, AgentKit, OpenAI Agents SDK).
open-source Claude-Artifacts/v0-style app that generates code from an LLM and executes it live in an E2B sandbox across Python/Next.js/Vue/Streamlit/Gradio templates with streaming UI
Firecracker-microVM-based sandbox infrastructure (orchestration via Nomad/Consul, autoscaling nodepools) that powers E2B's cloud code-interpreter sandboxes for AI agents
ChatGPT-plugin backend exposing a sandboxed cloud filesystem/process/session API (via E2B) so a ChatGPT agent can run arbitrary code and shell commands.
An MCP server (JS and Python editions) exposing E2B sandboxed code execution as a `run_code` tool callable from Claude Desktop or other MCP clients.
runs a VNC-controlled Ubuntu desktop sandbox (E2B) driven by a computer-use agent loop that swaps in grounding/vision/action models per provider config

A Next.js web app that streams OpenAI's computer-use agent actions in real time against an E2B virtual desktop sandbox, letting a user issue natural-language instructions and watch the agent operate a live desktop.
runs the SWE-bench harness's per-instance grading inside E2B sandboxes instead of Docker, with a persistent ledger for resumable batched build-and-verify runs
an installer that drops a set of named subagent persona files and orchestration-skill markdown files into Qwen Code's config directory, plus wires up two remote MCP servers (Context7, Grep)

Go CLI/MCP-server agent that queries kubeconfig clusters via GitHub Copilot SDK, running kubectl read/write ops behind confirmation prompts, with cost-optimized model routing and five swappable debugging/security/gitops personas

SQLite-backed shared memory store (52 tables) that hooks into Claude Code/Gemini/Codex/Kimi CLIs to persist decisions, error resolutions, and facts across sessions and surface them via an MCP server and `mem suggest` search
a durable-execution workflow engine built entirely on Postgres (no separate services), providing step-function-style task scheduling, retries, and a Go-based dashboard UI for observing runs/queues
spins up fast local Linux micro-VMs (QEMU or libkrun) with programmable HTTP/TLS egress policy, secret injection without guest exposure, VFS mounts, and snapshot/resume, exposed via a TS SDK and CLI.
a daily-driver coding-agent CLI (pi-coding-agent) plus reusable agent-runtime and unified multi-provider LLM API packages, with extensions, skills, RPC mode, and session/compaction management

A pi (coding agent) extension that bridges Discord/Telegram channels to per-channel sandboxed micro-VM agent sessions with persistent memory, skills, encrypted secret exchange, and tmux-based multi-worker orchestration.

a Pi coding-agent extension adding /review and /end-review slash commands that diff uncommitted changes, branches, commits, or GitHub PRs and produce prioritized findings routed separately to agent vs human

Edge-device control stack for a physical companion robot on Horizon RDK X5: multithreaded Python scheduler coordinating C++/ONNX face-emotion-gesture tracking, serial servo control, and cloud LLM/ASR/TTS calls (Qwen-VL, Whisper, Tencent TTS).
self-hosted Go/Postgres service providing a viral waitlist widget (referrals, leaderboard, fraud checks) plus a hosted MCP server exposing campaign/signup/invite-management tools with OAuth 2.1.
AutoGen-based pipeline that transcribes meeting audio (speech_recognition/Azure), summarizes it via GPT, and extracts action items through three specialized agents coordinated by an orchestrator

A library of agent skills (SKILL.md files) plus supporting JS/Python packages that let a coding agent generate, inspect, and export real CAD/robot-description artifacts (STEP, URDF, SDF, G-code) with local preview and slicing.
A Spring Boot/Spring AI Java project combining a romance-advice RAG chatbot demo (LoveApp) with a general-purpose ReAct tool-calling agent (YuManus), plus a sibling MCP image-search server module.

CLI that gives coding agents (Cursor et al.) a team of extra tools: web search via Perplexity, repo-context queries via Gemini, browser automation via Stagehand, MCP client/marketplace, GitHub/Linear/ClickUp integrations, and a test-runner command.

A Rust agent-kernel base for building vertical AI agents: 42+ LLM providers, 25+ channels, explicit boundaries between assistant/gateway/channel layers, and a large bundled skill library (office document editing, Lark/Feishu suite integration, browser automation) that ships compatible with existing OpenClaw/Claude Code/Codex configs.
An mdBook-published ebook (CN/EN) arguing solo founders can run one-person companies once agents can work independently, with GitHub Actions deploy to a hosted reader site.
1-click installer and browser UI wrapping Stable Diffusion (and newer engines like Flux/Lumina) for local text-to-image generation.

Low-code federated learning platform providing client/server/tracker gRPC services, dataset simulation (statistical/system heterogeneity), and reference FL algorithms (FedAvg-style) for PyTorch models, with example applications for re-ID and self-supervised learning research.

Runs a fixed 6-worker pipeline (background analysis -> competitor analysis -> PRD -> design doc -> acceptance tests -> dev handoff) over a chosen LLM backend (mock/Ollama/OpenAI/internal), configurable full/quick/custom mode, outputting markdown artifacts per stage

Spring Boot/Vue full-stack demo combining Spring AI, MCP protocol, and pgvector RAG into two showcase apps: a simulated TCM (traditional Chinese medicine) diagnosis chatbot and a 'Manus'-style tool-dispatching super-agent.

K12-focused local RAG system: FastAPI + LangGraph orchestrates hybrid Milvus+BM25 retrieval, CrossEncoder reranking, a retrieval-quality gate with retry/abstain logic, and RAGAS-based answer/retrieval evaluation, with a CLI for setup/sample docs.

Python library that provisions a GCP preemptible compute instance running a FastAPI model-serving container behind nginx/LetsEncrypt HTTPS, with a Cloud Function autostarter that restarts the instance when GCP reclaims it.
Self-hosted voice assistant (FastAPI+React+Ollama) with Raspberry Pi voice satellites, a ReAct agent chaining 10 MCP servers/100+ tools, and a local RAG knowledge base, fully offline.

a high-throughput security data pipeline (Kafka/ES/ClickHouse in and out) with an XML rules/CEP detection engine and LLM-powered agent nodes that can be interleaved with rules in the same stream for alert triage, enrichment, and auto-rule/whitelist generation

An enterprise e-commerce ops platform where admins configure multiple LLM backends and per-agent tools/skills/knowledge bases, and users chat with agents (1:1, group chat, image generation) with RAG over uploaded docs.

Spring Boot backend for a student health-tracking app implementing a ReAct agent with tool-calling (diet analysis, PDF report generation, web search) backed by a RAG knowledge base of health documents, plus a companion MCP server for AI image-based food search.

A Java/Spring Boot health-management backend implementing a ReAct-style tool-calling agent (file ops, PDF generation, web search/scraping, DB queries) plus RAG over health/nutrition documents via pgvector, alongside a separate MCP image-search server module, backing a diet/health-tracking app.

Python script that walks a PDF page by page, uses OpenAI structured outputs to extract/skip knowledge points per page, persists a resumable JSON knowledge base, and periodically generates markdown summaries.

CLI (`bar`) that wraps any coding agent (Claude Code, aider, cursor) in an isolated git worktree, logs every step to an auditable ledger, and supports diff review, apply-to-main, and rollback of agent changes
CLI + web-UI coding agent (Node/React+Ink) with 20+ built-in tools, MCP client, skills system, cross-session persistent memory, and permission modes (default/autoEdit/plan/yolo)

a Rust CLI coding agent (Orca) purpose-built for DeepSeek models: multi-turn tool-use loop, SSE streaming, hook system with structured JSON actions, custom TOML tool descriptors, and a workflow scripting subsystem

Claude-Code/Codex/Antigravity-compatible skill that orchestrates 9 role-based subagents (PM, Architect, Dev, QA, etc.) through a gated pipeline producing PRD/architecture/tasks/QA artifacts under `.boss/<feature>/`, with an events-log source of truth and DAG-based workflow scheduling
a Claude Code/agent Skill implementing a 5-phase (proposal/requirements/design/tasks/implementation) spec-driven workflow with EARS-format requirements and templated markdown docs
an open spec (skill.yaml manifest + execution trace format + assertions) plus a runtime SDK, CLI, and MCP server for making Agent Skill invocations observable and verifiable
CLI that tails Claude Code's JSONL session logs across projects and reformats the shell commands Claude ran into a familiar shell-history view, with follow/multiline/per-project modes.

a bot platform that scans GitHub build failures (Travis/Jenkins), runs automated program repair tools (Nopol, NPEFix, Astor, Sorald) against them, and opens PRs with generated patches, tracked via MongoDB
Automated paper-review framework: fine-tuned LLM plus a small learned scoring module (SEA-A) that reads PDF-parsed papers and produces structured, consistent review feedback.
Builds a semantic mind-graph of a paper plus a hierarchical background-graph of related work, then retrieves across both to explain what a terse peer-review comment actually means.

A Claude Code skill that lets Claude split a task into lanes, spawn the Codex CLI as a coordinated second agent via a shared .agent-handoff/ directory, and lead review/merge, with a file-based owner-map to avoid file-overlap conflicts.

A Go reimplementation of CrewAI/LangGraph-style agent orchestration: typed agents/crews/tasks, durable flow checkpointing to SQLite/Redis, vector-backed long-term memory (Chroma/Pinecone/Qdrant/Weaviate), A2A and MCP protocol support, OpenTelemetry tracing, and a web dashboard.

Go platform that orchestrates a pipeline of specialized pentest-phase agents (recon, attack-surface enumeration, privilege escalation, lateral movement, persistence, exfiltration, cleanup) over 100+ integrated security tools and a built-in lightweight C2 framework, exposed via REST and MCP for both human and AI-agent driven authorized engagements.
collection of independently-deployable Go MCP servers wrapping security-recon APIs (FOFA, ZoomEye) over stdio JSON-RPC, plus a scaffold template for adding more
A set of AI-agent skills (institutional/technical/fundamental/sentiment analysts + market scanner) that call the Stockbit API to compute a weighted 'Master Quant Score' for Indonesian equities.
desktop app (Tauri/Rust + React) bundling a llama.cpp inference server with an OpenAI-compatible API, multi-user accounts with per-user API keys, chat UI, and an admin CLI

GitHub CLI extension plus a git-submodule-distributed framework of Goose/Claude-Code recipes and skills that drives requirement→scoping→design→implementation→compliance-verify→review→merge entirely through GitHub issue labels, auto-chaining agent stages (design→implementation→compliance-verify) without human input between them

a local-first SQLite-backed visual library app for cataloguing AI image-generation prompts and their resulting images, with collections/tags/search, prompt-variable templating, and optional ChatGPT/Codex OAuth-driven local image generation with queue management

An installable agent skill (SKILL.md + scripts) that converts HTML to vector PDF via WeasyPrint with CJK font support and CSS Paged Media pagination rules, plus a blank-page detection script for output verification, packaged for Claude Code and a Hermes agent framework.

Rust LLM gateway/proxy that wraps coding-agent CLI launches (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Crush, CodeBuddy) and compresses noisy tool outputs (file listings, git logs, test/build output) before they hit the model context, plus multi-provider routing and a live statusline

A Rust-native local inference server exposing an OpenAI-compatible API (chat completions, transcription, embeddings) that auto-selects the best runtime/backend per model and caches downloaded models across apps.

A runtime policy-enforcement library that intercepts tool calls in agent frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, Claude Agent SDK, Google ADK, etc.) and blocks/approves them against declarative YAML rules and multi-stage workflow gates, deterministically and pre-execution.
OpenCode plugin that, on session init inside a git worktree, copies the main repo's .opencode/memory files into the worktree if the worktree's memory is still empty scaffolding.

native desktop workspace that runs multiple AI coding-CLI agents (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, etc.) in parallel tabs with live status dots (via per-tool hook/notify forwarders), session history, git diff panel, task board, and remote SSH launch, fully localized in 11 languages
typed Rust client, CLI, and read-only MCP server for the licensed Healthpoint HL7 FHIR API, with a synthetic-fixture mode for offline/no-credential use
